proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with higher `feature_046` have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with lower `feature_046`.
Patients with higher `feature_039` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients with lower `feature_039`.

analyses.result_summary: Simple linear regression estimated a +1.0989 month change in pfs_months per one-unit increase in feature_046 (p=<1e-300).
Simple linear regression estimated a -1.5353 month change in pfs_months per one-unit increase in feature_039 (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_039` equal to 1 have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_039` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_046` equal to 1 have a different mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_046` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_039=1 had mean pfs_months 3.617 vs 5.152 for feature_039=0; difference +-1.535 months (p=<1e-300).
feature_046=1 had mean pfs_months 5.408 vs 4.309 for feature_046=0; difference 1.099 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `feature_044` is associated with longer `pfs_months`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `feature_027` is associated with shorter `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Standardized OLS estimated +1.75 months per SD increase in feature_044 (p=<1e-300).
Standardized OLS estimated -0.799 months per SD increase in feature_027 (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_046` and `pfs_months` remains after adjustment for the strongest screened features.
The negative association between `feature_039` and `pfs_months` remains after adjustment for the strongest screened features.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033 (continuous features standardized)
analyses.result_summary: In a multivariable OLS model including 16 screened features, feature_046 retained an adjusted effect of +1.101 months (p=<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033 (continuous features standardized)
analyses.result_summary: In the same multivariable model, feature_039 retained an adjusted effect of -1.549 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the highest quartile of `feature_044` have longer mean `pfs_months` than the rest of the cohort.
Patients in the highest quartile of `feature_027` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than the rest of the cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Highest-quartile feature_044 (>=71.8) had mean pfs_months 6.943 vs 3.934 otherwise; difference +3.009 months (p=<1e-300).
Highest-quartile feature_027 (>=1) had mean pfs_months 4.179 vs 5.638 otherwise; difference -1.459 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for other strong screened variables, higher `feature_046` is independently associated with longer `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS coefficient from pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for feature_046 was 1.101 months (SE 0.011, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for other strong screened variables, higher `feature_069` is independently associated with longer `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS coefficient from pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for feature_069 was 0.53 months (SE 0.015, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for other strong screened variables, higher `feature_004` is independently associated with longer `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS coefficient from pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for feature_004 was 0.235 months (SE 0.005, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for other strong screened variables, higher `feature_044` is independently associated with longer `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS coefficient from pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for feature_044 was 1.749 months (SE 0.005, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for other strong screened variables, higher `feature_039` is independently associated with shorter `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS coefficient from pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_004 + feature_010 + feature_044 + feature_025 + feature_020 + feature_007 + feature_039 + feature_027 + feature_015 + feature_031 + feature_063 + feature_037 + feature_062 + feature_033
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for feature_039 was -1.549 months (SE 0.011, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `feature_046` with `pfs_months` is modified by `feature_069`, with a positive interaction term.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_046:feature_069
analyses.result_summary: Interaction model pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_069 + feature_046:feature_069 estimated an interaction effect of 1.591 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `feature_046` with `pfs_months` is modified by `feature_010`, with a positive interaction term.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_010 + feature_046:feature_010
analyses.result_summary: Interaction model pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_010 + feature_046:feature_010 estimated an interaction effect of 1.09 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `feature_046` with `pfs_months` is modified by `feature_025`, with a positive interaction term.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_025 + feature_046:feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Interaction model pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_025 + feature_046:feature_025 estimated an interaction effect of 0.418 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `feature_046` with `pfs_months` is modified by `feature_031`, with a negative interaction term.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_031 + feature_046:feature_031
analyses.result_summary: Interaction model pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_031 + feature_046:feature_031 estimated an interaction effect of -1.624 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `feature_046` with `pfs_months` is modified by `feature_063`, with a negative interaction term.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_063 + feature_046:feature_063
analyses.result_summary: Interaction model pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_063 + feature_046:feature_063 estimated an interaction effect of -1.365 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of `feature_046` with `pfs_months` is modified by `feature_062`, with a negative interaction term.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_062 + feature_046:feature_062
analyses.result_summary: Interaction model pfs_months ~ feature_046 + feature_062 + feature_046:feature_062 estimated an interaction effect of -0.638 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The standardized association between `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is weaker/more negative among patients with `feature_046` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_046` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary-by-continuous interaction feature_046:z(feature_062) was -0.638 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The standardized association between `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is weaker/more negative among patients with `feature_069` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_069` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary-by-continuous interaction feature_069:z(feature_062) was -0.311 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The standardized association between `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is stronger/more positive among patients with `feature_031` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_031` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary-by-continuous interaction feature_031:z(feature_062) was 0.36 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The standardized association between `feature_062` and `pfs_months` is stronger/more positive among patients with `feature_063` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_063` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Binary-by-continuous interaction feature_063:z(feature_062) was 0.255 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_044` at or above its 75th percentile have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.

analyses.result_summary: Threshold feature_044 >= 71.8 (q=0.75) had a mean difference of 3.009 months (n=12600, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_044` at or above its 25th percentile have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.

analyses.result_summary: Threshold feature_044 >= 58.2 (q=0.25) had a mean difference of 2.947 months (n=37668, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_044` at or above its 50th percentile have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.

analyses.result_summary: Threshold feature_044 >= 65 (q=0.5) had a mean difference of 2.826 months (n=25044, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_027` at or above its 50th percentile have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.

analyses.result_summary: Threshold feature_027 >= 1 (q=0.5) had a mean difference of -1.459 months (n=32404, p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_027` at or above its 75th percentile have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.

analyses.result_summary: Threshold feature_027 >= 1 (q=0.75) had a mean difference of -1.459 months (n=32404, p=<1e-300).

analysis_notes: P-values use large-sample normal approximations to OLS t-statistics; continuous features were standardized where explicitly stated. Patient_id was excluded from analyses.
